items.claim: Royval's 45% takedown defense is a vulnerability that Cavanal will look to exploit.
items.quote: Royval's got a 45% takedown defense, so that might be something that Loughnane wants to attack.

items.claim: Cavanal has a 94% takedown defense rate.
items.quote: Cavana 94% takedown defense, that's impressive so far.

items.claim: Sandhagen's takedown defense percentage dropped to 56% after being taken down 20 times by Merab Dvalishvili.
items.quote: Sandhagen 56% takedown defense, although that's been going up. ... or that percentage is yeah, is definitely been getting better, but then all of a sudden Merab Dvalishvili came in and took him down 20 times. So, he dropped that thing way back down to 56%.

items.claim: Bautista will be able to compete with Sandhagen on the feet despite the reach difference.
items.quote: Bautista's going to be able to hang on the feet.

items.claim: Paddy Pimblett's 44% takedown defense makes him susceptible to being controlled on the ground by Saint Denis.
items.quote: the takedown defense of Paddy the Baddy is important here, right? 44%. That's not very good. And if he gets it to the ground, he could potentially be controlled there.

items.claim: Benoit Saint Denis has the ability to potentially destroy Paddy Pimblett on the ground.
items.quote: I'm not blind to the fact that Benoit Saint Denis could just uh destroy him on the ground potentially.
